zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Whetenhall於1325年出生在英國英格蘭爾阿克頓時，她的父親Sir John Wettenhall III30歲，母親Agnes de Arderne20歲。她於大約1349年與Sir Adam De Bostock在英國爾保斯托結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1369年在英國英格蘭波克夏阿炳頓享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Whetenhall于1325年出生在英国英格兰爾阿克頓时，她的父亲Sir John Wettenhall III30岁，母亲Agnes de Arderne20岁。她于大约1349年与Sir Adam De Bostock在英国爾保斯托结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1369年在英国英格兰波克夏阿炳頓享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Whetenhall was born in 1325, in Acton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Wettenhall III, was 30 and her mother, Agnes de Arderne, was 20. She married Sir Adam De Bostock about 1349, in Bostock, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1369, in Abingdon, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Whetenhall est née en 1325, à Acton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Wettenhall III, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Arderne, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Adam De Bostock environ 1349, à Bostock, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1369, à Abingdon, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Whetenhall 1325 in Acton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Wettenhall III 30 und ihre Mutter Agnes de Arderne 20. Sie hat um 1349 in Bostock, Cheshire, England Sir Adam De Bostock geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1369 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Abingdon, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Whetenhall è nata il nel 1325 nel Acton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John Wettenhall III, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Agnes de Arderne, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Sir Adam De Bostock circa 1349, nel Bostock, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1369, nel Abingdon, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Whetenhallが1325年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアアクトンで生まれた時，父Sir John Wettenhall IIIは30歳，母Agnes de Arderneは20歳であった。約1349年にイギリスチェシュアイアボストックでSir Adam De Bostockと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1369年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアアビングドンで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Whetenhall(이)가 1325년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 악턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Wettenhall III(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes de Arderne(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1349년 영국 체실르 보스톡에서 Sir Adam De Bostock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1369년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 압잉던에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Whetenhall nasceu em 1325, em Acton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Wettenhall III, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Arderne, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Adam De Bostock aproximadamente 1349, em Bostock, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1369, em Abingdon, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Whetenhall родилась в 1325 г. в местности актон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Wettenhall III было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Arderne, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Adam De Bostock около 1349 г. в местности бостокк, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1369 г. в местности абингдон, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Whetenhall nació en 1325, en Acton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Wettenhall III, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Agnes de Arderne, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Sir Adam De Bostock aproximadamente 1349, en Bostock, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1369, en Abingdon, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 44 años.
